title: Reder Blader Crystal PvP
body:
#  _Reder Blader_
A cool Recource pack that is specifically for Crystal PvP

Features: No explosion particle 
Smaller Totems
Animated Eye sword
Low Fire




Feel free to change the pack and only release on modrinth 

>
#Crystal Pvp

!!!WAIT!!! 


_Reder Blader V3 is out_


### _New Stuff_
- Better and cleaner look
- Mace and Axe are now textured 
- Anchores Crystal and Obsidian are renewed
- Gapples look better
- Arrow Texture Fix
### And so on

Suggestion are Reddit page 
https://www.reddit.com/r/crystalpvp/comments/1ku67wo/i_made_an_red_crystal_pvp_pack/]

ill not do anything new until some1 says smt on the discord or reddit page
